title: RBI imposes monetary penalty on The Kodagu District Co-operative Central Bank Limited, Karnataka
description: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has, by an order dated March 20, 2026, imposed a monetary penalty of ₹1 lakh (Rupees One Lakh only) on The Kodagu District Co-operative Central Bank Limited, Karnataka (the bank) for contravention of provisions of Section 20 read with Section 56 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (BR Act). This penalty has been imposed in exercise of powers conferred on RBI under the provisions of Section 47A(1)(c) read with Sections 46(4)(i) and 56 of the BR Act. The statu
